title: Delhi Red Fort blast: NIA chargesheet reveals abuse of AI platform for ‘terror engineering’
description: The National Investigation Agency (NIA) probe into the Red Fort area car blast case in Delhi has found that a chargesheeted accused, linked to an offshoot of global terrorist outfit Al-Qaida, allegedly misused an artificial intelligence (AI) platform for “terror engineering”, official sources said on Sunday.

description: NIA investigation into the Red Fort car blast uncovers a disturbing use of artificial intelligence for terror engineering. title: Opinion | This corporate jargon has spread so quickly but it is simply plagiarism
description: A letter to the editor says that artificial intelligence is a misnomer for "high-speed algorithmic plagiarism."
content:
We are being hypnotized by a massive psychological bluff hidden behind a deceptive piece of corporate branding: "Artificial Intelligence."

title: Talk To Your Furries Now! Chinese Startup Creates AI Pet Translator; Claims 95% Reading Accuracy
description: The Hangzhou-based company, Meng Xiaoyi, says its futuristic pet translator device is designed to help owners better understand what their cats and dogs are trying to communicate. Unlike novelty pet translator apps that are mostly built for fun, the startup insists its technology is backed by artificial intelligence and behavioural data analysis.
content:
A tech startup from China has sparked massive curiosity online after claiming to develop an AI-powered gadget that can supposedly interpret pets’ sounds, emotions and behaviour into human language.
